SELECT java_lang_System::getProperty('java.runtime.version') AS runtime_version, java_lang_System::getProperty('os.name') AS os_name FROM java_lang_System;
SELECT java_lang_List::getelement() FROM java_lang_List WHERE element LIKE '%path%';
CREATE TABLE java_lang_Map (key NVARCHAR, value NVARCHAR);
INSERT INTO java_lang_Map SELECT getProperty('user.home'), getProperty('user.dir');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT key, value FROM java_lang_Map) AS mapped;
SELECT class_name FROM java_lang_Object WHERE class_name LIKE 'java.%';
SELECT java_lang_System::getProperty('java.home') AS java_home, java_lang_System::getProperty('java.vendor') AS java_vendor FROM java_lang_System;
SELECT size FROM java_util_Vector WHERE size > 0 ORDER BY size DESC;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT getProperty('java.version') AS version, getProperty('java.vendor.url') AS vendor_url FROM java_lang_System) AS java_info WHERE version IS NOT NULL;
